errors.networkError: Connection issue. Please check your network.
errors.sessionExpiredDescription: Your session has expired. Please reopen the app.
errors.serverErrorDescription: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.
errors.authRejected: Telegram authentication was rejected by the server. Please reopen the app from Telegram.
errors.connectionFailedDescription: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.unexpectedDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.openInTelegram: Please open this app in Telegram
errors.openInTelegramDescription: MyRafeeq is a Telegram Mini App and needs to be launched from within Telegram.

settings.title: Settings
settings.madhabDescription: Standard is used by Shafi'i, Maliki, and Hanbali schools. Hanafi calculates a later Asr time.
settings.hijriDescription: Adjust if the Hijri date doesn't match your local sighting.
settings.adjustmentsDescription: Adjust each prayer time by up to ±30 minutes to match your local mosque or community times.
settings.feedbackUnavailable: Feedback is currently unavailable. Please try again later.

welcome.card1Description: Stay connected to your faith with prayer times, Quran, and daily spiritual guidance.
welcome.card2Description: Get accurate prayer times for your location and smart reminders so you're always prepared.
welcome.card3Description: Read Quran, explore Hadith, count dhikr, and discover beautiful duas — all in one place.

location.title: Accurate Prayer Times Need Your Location
location.description: Prayer times vary by city. Share your location for precise calculations and Qibla direction.
location.privacyNote: Your location stays private and is never shared.
location.typeToSearch: Type at least 2 characters to search

notifications.title: Never Miss a Prayer
notifications.description: MyRafeeq sends prayer reminders as Telegram messages — right in your chat.

completion.title: Ma sha Allah, You're All Set!
completion.description: Your prayer companion is ready. May your journey with MyRafeeq bring you closer to Allah.
